implementation_validation: At v0.5.216, all 551 regression cases, 43 NP cases, and 1,518 construction assertions pass. Coverage is 132 positive-and-boundary, 0 positive-only, 0 implementation-only, 0 no-direct-cases, and 1 explicitly guarded compatibility alias. Thirteen added zero-evidence probes assert stable JSON semantics for retained internal contract, question/copular, and discourse nodes.
linguistic_confidence: This release records final evidence-and-ontology dispositions for the original 37 unsupported-generalization and 15 parser-heuristic labels without promoting or retiring any label. The new probes establish implementation invariants only and carry zero linguistic-evidence weight.
overclaim_review_scope: Reviewed all original 52 labels against their exact main.js paths, tests, A1 and compatibility effects, cited research records, and source scope. Each canonical note records one final disposition, source limits, stable internal semantics where applicable, and unresolved migration work.
unresolved_release_questions: Broad wrappers remain quarantined pending the construction-specific evidence and typed migrations recorded in their canonical notes.
Future status promotion still requires construction-specific source breadth and role-neutral panel evidence.
RUL and PFV survey integration remains paused pending clean locked-instrument evidence.
